overall.description: Gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins depicting ancient Alexandria. A character in period attire walks through classical architecture during golden hour, descending to a harbor overlook before transitioning to an eagle flight over the water toward the Lighthouse of Alexandria.

scene_state.functional_zone: classical garden promenade between temple structures

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a stone path between classical buildings and manicured hedges

entered.detail: stone building with columns and dark windows
circular building with lattice windows covered in ivy
irregular stone tiles forming a walkway
trimmed green hedges lining the path
tall ancient lighthouse visible in the distant background
broad tree with spreading canopy near the round temple

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a stone path between a rectangular classical building on the left and a round temple structure on the right, surrounded by manicured hedges and a large acacia tree, with the Lighthouse of Alexandria visible in the golden hour distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone stairway descending through archway to harbor overlook

events.description: enters enclosed stone stairway passage with archway framing the lighthouse ahead

agents.ego_description: walking down stone stairs through an enclosed passage with geometric mosaic pavement

entered.detail: descending stairs with stone walls on both sides
arched opening at the bottom of the stairs revealing the harbor
classical statue atop a column at the stairway entrance
high stone walls flanking the staircase

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a mosaic terrace and descends a stone stairway through an enclosed passage, with the lighthouse becoming visible through the archway ahead, flanked by high stone walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: balcony overlook of ancient harbor at sunset

events.description: exits stairway onto open balcony with panoramic harbor view
character stops at stone parapet to look out over the harbor

agents.ego_description: walking along the balcony edge and stopping to overlook the harbor and lighthouse

entered.detail: low stone wall along the edge of the overlook
calm water of the ancient harbor reflecting sunset
ancient sailing vessels with triangular sails docked in the harbor
ancient stone buildings lining the harbor shore

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto an open balcony, the character walks along the stone parapet overlooking the ancient harbor of Alexandria, with the famous lighthouse visible across the water and sailing ships docked below, stopping to take in the view.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial view of harbor and lighthouse from eagle perspective

events.description: perspective shifts to eagle taking flight over the harbor
eagle flies past the Lighthouse of Alexandria revealing the full harbor

agents.ego_description: controlling an eagle to survey the harbor and lighthouse from above

notable_agents.action: eagle soaring over the harbor with wings spread wide

entered.detail: island base supporting the lighthouse structure
dense cluster of ancient buildings on the right shoreline

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts to an eagle soaring over the harbor, flying past the Lighthouse of Alexandria on the left and providing an aerial view of the ancient city, ships, and coastline during the golden sunset.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous progression from a grounded walk through classical gardens to a sweeping aerial vista of the ancient harbor. It begins with a character walking a stone path between a rectangular building and a round temple, flanked by manicured hedges and a large acacia tree under a golden hour sky. As the character crosses a mosaic terrace, the camera descends through a stone stairway and an enclosed passage, where the Lighthouse of Alexandria first appears framed by a distant archway. The scene then opens onto a wide balcony overlooking the harbor, following the character along a stone parapet past docked sailing ships before the perspective seamlessly shifts upward. Finally, the camera transforms into an eagle soaring over the water, gliding past the towering lighthouse to reveal a panoramic view of the city and coastline during the golden sunset.
